name: space_analysis_find_corridor_width_from_point
desc: Fire ±X and ±Y rays to the nearest walls, return wall-to-wall widths on both axes, the narrow (corridor) width in mm, and the corridor long-axis.

parameters.name: max_distance_ft
parameters.description: Optional max cast per side (feet). Default 100 ft.

keywords: space analysis find corridor width from point
